---
title: "\'The Trusty Servant\'"
---

## \'The Trusty Servant\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1890
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (1890) 143-145

### Notes

The article is signed Charlotte M. Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
